g.text: edits manifests and charts in repository source of truth
commits and pushes to remote Git repository
Repository source of truth -> Generated inputs -> Remote Git repository
Flux reconciles remote repository state, not local working tree
Generated manifests must be committed and pushed
the shell wrapper only applies that path
may render MetalLB values for host-based paths
AgenticNativePlatform - Current GitOps Staging And Profile Composition
